run.Chinese:
用法：run <脚本路径> [参数]
功能：异步执行脚本文件（支持.sh/.py/.exe等格式）
示例：
  run ~/test.sh - 异步执行shell脚本
  run /tools/scan.py 127.0.0.1 - 带参数执行Python脚本
适配系统：Windows/Linux/Termux全兼容
run.English:
Usage: run <script path> [arguments]
Function: Execute script files asynchronously (supports .sh/.py/.exe etc.)
Examples:
  run ~/test.sh - Execute shell script asynchronously
  run /tools/scan.py 127.0.0.1 - Execute Python script with arguments
Compatible systems: Windows/Linux/Termux
